TEXT: Oh! A visitor... You don't have great timing.
I am the Librarian. I maintain this library... or I did, before Golem went berserk.

NAME: Librarian
TEXT: That golem has been rampaging through the lobby, and I cannot stop it alone.

NAME: Librarian
TEXT: Scattered throughout the lobby, there are four red gems, fragments of the golem's safety core. Collect them all, and I reward you with a Dash Charm.

NAME: Librarian
TEXT: Bring them to the assistant near the entrance. They will transfer them to me as I fix the golem.

NAME: Librarian
TEXT: Oh, and I must ask you to not touch the walls. The books are very sensitive. I pray for your success.
